description: Week 02:Python Project Week.Module 06: Streamlit and Gemini API.Sreamlit.app
peekOfCode:
api_key = os.environ.get("GEMINI_API_KEY")
client = genai.Client(api_key=api_key)
response = client.models.generate_content(
    model="gemini-3-flash-preview",
    contents="Give me an idea of Gemini API in 100 words"
)
st.markdown(response.text)
detail: Week 02:Python Project Week.Module 06: Streamlit and Gemini API.Sreamlit.app

peekOfCode:
name = st.text_input("Enter your name")
print(type(name))
age = st.number_input("Enter your age",value=None,placeholder="Type your age...")
pressed = st.button("Enter to confirm",type="primary")
selected = st.selectbox("Choose your profession",
             ("Student","Employee","Businessman"),
             index=None,
             accept_new_options = True
             )
print(type(selected))
